ocr.text: In the evolving landscape of technology and software, the importance of robust cybersecurity measures cannot be overstated.
Recent statistics indicate a concerning rise in threats, with the total count of cybersecurity incidents reaching a significant figure
of 20.0, underscoring the urgency for organizations to enhance their defenses.

As organizations strive to mitigate these risks, the reduction of technical debt becomes paramount, enabling a more resilient
developer ecosystem. In this context, companies are increasingly leveraging innovative solutions to bolster their defenses and
enhance overall market share, which currently stands at an impressive 85%. This report aims to provide a comprehensive
overview of these metrics, alongside actionable insights for stakeholders to navigate the complexities of the cybersecurity
landscape effectively.
